findings.description: Source has 6 h2 headings (概要, 特徴, 要求, 構造, データモデル, 使用方法) but the knowledge file has only 4 sections. The 構造 section — which contains class diagrams, full interface/class definition tables (~6 entries), and the sequence diagram explanation — is merged into s2 (titled 特徴) without a dedicated section. Per V3 rules, when an h2 section has ≥2000 chars of plain text and has h3 subheadings (クラス図, 各クラスの責務, シーケンス図), it should be represented as its own section rather than folded into a sibling h2. Similarly, 要求 is merged into s1 (概要) without a dedicated section.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 sections with '-----' underline: 概要, 特徴, 要求, 構造, データモデル, 使用方法. The 構造 section spans from 'クラス図' through the end of the hook ordering explanation and contains three h3 subheadings and multiple h4/h5 tables.
